page.title: The Week That Was
page.kicker: 📰 The official TLPT running column — weekly heaters, collapses, bad decisions, statistical slander, and whatever fresh nonsense the spreadsheet uncovered.
page.introNote: Weekly swings, fresh chaos, and the kind of statistical receipts that make the group chat go quiet for a few minutes.

author.name: BostnMike
author.blurb: Commissioner, stat-chaser, and part-time curator of league shame. Each week he reviews the numbers, finds the real story, and documents the latest TLPT public embarrassments for the historical record.

weeks.dek: A week of fresh faces, fresh bruises, and one very productive trip to the cash cage by NASA Al.

summaryCards.label: 🔥 Heater of the Week
summaryCards.copy: The cleanest established-player surge of the week — profit up, hits up, cashes up, and not a lot of wasted drama.

summaryCards.label: 🚀 Biggest Riser
summaryCards.copy: Arrived like the room had been waiting on him personally and immediately posted numbers loud enough to bother the veterans.

summaryCards.label: 📉 Worst Slide
summaryCards.copy: More entries, less joy, and the kind of week that reads less like variance and more like an invoice.

summaryCards.label: 🎉 New Blood
summaryCards.copy: Three new names, three immediate impacts, and just enough disruption to make the regulars defensive by Tuesday.
